_comment: andenacitelli credit description -> curated shape, for credits that map onto an existing SpendingCredit taxonomy entry (see data/input/system/spending_credits.json) or category, but whose cadence/credit_type andenacitelli's flat {description, value, weight} can't express. value is derived by dividing andenacitelli's annualized value by times_per_year here. Add an entry only when import_external_cards reports a 'credits' change you want normalized instead of left flat.
